MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Patricia Hailey

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: D. Carter;
Matter not reported.

Plaintiff Bank of America is present represented by Jonathan Vaknin, Esq.
Defendant Patricia Hailey is not present.

Mr. Vaknin stated he does not have any courtesy copies on this matter and does not have a proposed judgment.

This matter is continued to July 17, 2026 at 9:00am in dept. 505 to give Mr. Vaknin an oppertunity to provide the court with pleadings on this matter.
